module.name: require-clean-barrel
module.description: Require barrel files (index.*) to contain only module re-export declarations.

scenarios.name: should allow named module re-export declarations in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing export { foo } from './foo'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should allow wildcard module re-export declarations in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing export * from './foo'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should allow namespace and type wildcard module re-export declarations in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing export * as utils from './utils' and export type * from './types'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should allow mixed module re-exports in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing named, wildcard, and type-only re-export declarations
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should ignore non-barrel files
scenarios.given: a non-index source file with arbitrary top-level statements

scenarios.name: should ignore index files that are not barrel aggregators
scenarios.given: an index.ts file with no module re-export declarations
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should apply to single-extension JavaScript and module barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.js or index.mts file containing only module re-export declarations
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should ignore double-extension index files
scenarios.given: an index.d.ts, index.test.ts, or index.spec.js file containing non-barrel statements

scenarios.name: should report non-re-export top-level statements in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing import declarations or local declarations
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements
scenarios.then: a cleanBarrelOnlyReExports violation is reported for each disallowed statement

scenarios.name: should report local export declarations without source in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing export { foo } with no from source
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements

scenarios.name: should report directive and declaration statements in barrel files
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing a directive or a top-level function, class, interface, enum, or namespace declaration alongside a module re-export
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements
scenarios.then: a cleanBarrelOnlyReExports violation is reported for each disallowed statement

scenarios.name: should report export assignment statements in barrel files once a module re-export exists
scenarios.given: an index.ts file containing export = value and at least one module re-export declaration
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level statements
scenarios.then: a cleanBarrelOnlyReExports violation is reported for the export assignment
